title: fatal error: runtime: netpoll failed
body:
### Issue Description

I'm using podman inside a container (with containerd) and sometime actions that involve push or pull images ends with "fatal error: runtime: netpoll failed"

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman build -t registry.com/image .
2. podman login registry.com
3. podman push registry.com/image


### Describe the results you received

Getting image source signatures

### Podman in a container

Yes

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

Podman is inside a container, built from registry.redhat.io/openshift4/ose-jenkins-agent-base:v4.10.0, on Kubernetes v1.29.3 on containerd 1.6.28-3.1.el7.
The host is a Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server release 7.9 (Maipo) with kernel 3.10.0-1160.53.1.el7.x86_64

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
We only support the lastest version upstream, if you are using RHEL this is best reported through the Red Hat support channels instead.
In general this does not like like a podman issue and rather something golang internal, e.g. https://github.com/golang/go/issues/24980.
